metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_5357
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 3: in biochemical fractions prepared from rat forebrain, Uev1A (UBE2V1) was enriched in PSD fractions.

Figure S3: confocal imaging of immunofluorescence labeling for Uev1A and PSD-95 (DLG4) in cultured hippocampal neurons showed partial co-localization. Further, Uev1A immunoprecipitation in mouse forebrain yields PSD95.

"In vitro ubiquitination assays using purified proteins showed that TRAF6, in conjunction with Ubc13/Uev1A, effectively delivered the ubiquitin moieties to PSD-95, which did not occur when TRAF6, UbK63, Ubc13, Uev1A, or PSD-95 was omitted from the reaction mix (Fig. 3E).". Experimental description: M&M: "high-density (1 × 106) hippocampal neurons were prepared from E18 rat embryos"

antibody:
anti-Uev1A (ProSci, 3375)
